plan.content:
# Sandbox AI Patch Note

v0.3.1 can generate an AI patch plan and apply it only inside the sandbox.

This note is for sandbox validation only. It does not affect the real project, start services, contact external systems, or enable any trading mode.
plan.reason: Add harmless sandbox-only note for v0.3.1 AI patch plan behavior.
